relations.note: The geometric alignment of the icon badge assumes the layout styles established in the hierarchy rule.
Corner radius specifications refine the shape definitions of both the outer box container and nested badge elements.

quotes: Light Blue `#E6F0F9` fill
Brand Blue `#00529b`, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~21px / 28px line-height
White `#ffffff` rounded square
Light Blue `#E6F0F9` fill, single accent shape.
Text ? Brand Blue `#00529b`, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~21px / 28px line-height, left-aligned, vertically centered to the box.
Icon badge ? a White `#ffffff` rounded square holding the line icon

rules.intent: Maintain consistent visual hierarchy, color palette, and typographical weight for callout proof points.
rules.rule_text: Icon callout boxes must use Light Blue (#E6F0F9) fill, Brand Blue (#00529b) headline text in Nunito Sans weight 800 (vertically centered), and a White (#ffffff) badge holding the icon.

quotes: The blue box itself is inset from the left by half the badge width so the badge's outer half has room
left padding must clear the overhanging badge half plus a gap (? `W/2 + 24px`).
horizontally centered on the box's left edge (the edge is the badge's perpendicular bisector ? 50% over the blue, 50% over the page background).
Let `W` = badge width (use 80px, icon ?48px inside).
Inset the blue box from the left by `W/2` = 40px, and place the badge so its center lands exactly on the box's left edge
Vertical center via `top:50%` + `margin-top:?40px` (half the badge height).
Defaults: badge size W = 80px, inner icon 48px.
keep the relationships  inset = W/2, box left-padding = W/2 + 24px, badge margin-top = ?H/2

rules.intent: Enforce the exact 50/50 bisecting alignment of the icon badge on the edge of the callout box across all screen widths.
rules.rule_text: The icon badge (width W = 80px) must be horizontally centered on the callout box's left edge (50% overhanging the page background and 50% over the blue box). The blue box must be inset from the left by exactly W/2 = 40px, and its internal left-padding must clear the badge overhang with a gap equal to W/2 + 24px (64px padding-left). For any other badge width, scale the inset to W/2, margin-top to -H/2, and internal left-padding to W/2 + 24px.
rules.snippets: These improvements occurred as early as four weeks after starting treatment, and they continued getting better through the end of the 52-week study.

quotes: <div style="position:relative; padding-left:40px;">
<td style="background-color:#E6F0F9; border-radius:40px 8px 40px 8px; padding:26px 34px 26px 64px;">

<div style="position:absolute; left:0; top:50%; margin-top:-40px; width:80px; height:80px; background-color:#ffffff; border-radius:20px 4px 20px 4px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(1,30,69,0.18); text-align:center; line-height:80px;">
box `border-radius: 40px 8px 40px 8px;` in `TL TR BR BL` order
white badge mirrors the same accent shape at smaller scale, `border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px;`
box `border-radius: 40px 8px 40px 8px;` in `TL TR BR BL` order  large on top-left + bottom-right, near-point on top-right + bottom-left, a 5:1 ratio.
The white badge mirrors the same accent shape at smaller scale, `border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px;` (also 5:1, large TL+BR).
Never simplify either to a single uniform radius, swap the corners, or flip the diagonal.

rules.intent: Maintain the proprietary 5:1 accent shape identity across nested container elements.
rules.rule_text: The outer callout box and the inner white badge must use asymmetric diagonal corner radii maintaining a 5:1 ratio (large TL/BR, near-point TR/BL). The container must use radii (40px 8px 40px 8px) and the white badge must use scaled radii (20px 4px 20px 4px). Never simplify to a single uniform radius, swap the corners, or flip the diagonal.

quotes: `box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(1, 30, 69, 0.18);` (Dark Navy at low opacity).
the white icon badge must carry a subtle drop shadow so it lifts off the blue box  e.g. `box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(1, 30, 69, 0.18);`
This shadow is required on every instance; without it the badge looks flat and pasted-on.

rules.intent: Ensure the overlapping layout maintains visual depth and separation from the background.
rules.rule_text: The white icon badge must carry a subtle drop shadow (using Dark Navy at low opacity) to lift it off the blue background.
